title: Mangalore's E-Waste Management Ecosystem
description: A flowchart illustrating the key stakeholders, processes, and outcomes in Mangalore's e-waste management system, highlighting the city's role as a case study.
elements: Recovery of Precious Metals & Safe Disposal
relationships: Generators dispose of e-waste through collection drives -> Collected waste is transported to authorized facilities -> Facilities dismantle, recycle, and recover materials -> Recycled materials re-enter the manufacturing cycle while hazardous waste is contained -> Policy bodies regulate and enable the entire process
